reasoning: Six potion_mana_v04 sprites (white glass bottles with bright blue liquid, pixel-art style) are arranged in a 2×3 grid on the dark red/brown dungeon floor. The blue color aligns well with the game's teal/cyan palette and the pixel-art rendering is style-consistent with the Echoes aesthetic. No confusion with other entities. Main weaknesses: sprites are small (~20px), the dark floor reduces overall pop, and the mechanical 2×3 grid arrangement looks artificial rather than naturally placed. Silhouette is recognizable as bottles once noticed, but locatability under time pressure is borderline.
